arts.ttl: New Atletico Madrid signing suffers 'traumatic brain injury' after sickening clash
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid centre-back Robin Le Normand suffered a 'traumatic brain injury' in the closing stages of the 1-1 draw with rivals Real Madrid on Sunday. "Robin Le Normand suffered a severe blow to the head in the final minutes of the Madrid derby," a club statement confirmed.

arts.ttl: Euro giants very interested in another Chelsea transfer raid following summer agreement
arts.sum: Chelsea left-back Ben Chilwell is reportedly the subject of transfer interest from Atletico Madrid, who are said to be very keen on a potential January deal for the Blues defender. arts.ttl: Exclusive: LFC star “completely focused on Liverpool” amid transfer speculation, says expert
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez remains completely focused on the Reds despite some transfer speculation over his future, according to journalist Fabrizio Romano. Speaking exclusively to CaughtOffside for the latest edition of his Daily Briefing column, Romano responded to the recent stories about Nunez and a possible move to Atletico Madrid, while he also shut down […] The post Exclusive: LFC star “completely focused on Liverpool” amid transfer speculation, says expert appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Benfica 25-26 Away Kit to Be 'Ecru'
arts.sum: We reported a few days ago that Benfica's away shirt would return to its traditional white and red colors, and we can confirm that this will be the case from the 26-27 season, as SL Benfica's new 2025-2026 away kit is already in concept and design.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid star Robin Le Normand suffers serious brain injury after sickening head clash
arts.sum: Robin Le Normand sustained a subdural haematoma following collision with Real Madrid's Aurelien Tchouameni at the weekend and Atletico Madrid have confirmed his issue was "traumatic"

arts.ttl: Benfica vs Atletico Madrid predictions: Atleti's away record could be their downfall
arts.sum: Benfica are unbeaten in seven and Joe Casey believes they can get something at home against Atletico Madrid in the Champions League on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid aware of 60-100 ultras that need to be banned as Thibaut Courtois ‘provocations’ are included in report
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have expelled one fan from the club after the incidents on Sunday night, where Thibaut Courtois was the target of a number of lighters from the Fondo Sur during the Madrid derby. Los Rojiblancos have faced wider calls to expel far-right ultra group Frente Altetico though.
